name: Sonic the Hedgehog
description: Sega's speedy blue mascot — the video games, cartoons, and Paramount film franchise

questions.q: Which Japanese video game company created Sonic as its mascot?

source.notes: Sonic debuted on the Sega Genesis/Mega Drive.

questions.q: What color is Sonic the Hedgehog?

source.notes: Specifically cobalt blue — matching Sega's corporate logo.

questions.q: Sonic was designed as Sega's answer to which Nintendo mascot?

source.notes: Faster, cooler, and more attitudinal than the plumber.

questions.q: What is the name of Sonic's two-tailed fox sidekick?

source.notes: Debuted in Sonic the Hedgehog 2 (1992).

questions.q: Who is Sonic's primary egg-shaped mustached-scientist archenemy?

source.notes: Originally known in the West as Dr. Robotnik.

questions.q: What shiny metallic collectibles do players gather throughout Sonic levels?

source.notes: Losing them all means Sonic dies on his next hit.

questions.q: In what year did the original Sonic the Hedgehog first release on the Sega Genesis?

source.notes: Released June 23, 1991.

questions.q: What are the seven powerful gemstones that grant Sonic his Super Sonic transformation?

source.notes: Collect all seven and 50 rings to trigger the transformation.

questions.q: Which red echidna first appeared in Sonic the Hedgehog 3 and guards the Master Emerald?

source.notes: Later befriends Sonic as part of the core trio.

questions.q: Who is the pink hedgehog who pursues Sonic romantically, first appearing in Sonic CD?

source.notes: Introduced 1993.

questions.q: Which mysterious jet-black hedgehog rival was introduced in Sonic Adventure 2?

source.notes: Created by Professor Gerald Robotnik, Eggman's grandfather.

questions.q: Which 1998 Sonic Team game was Sonic's first full 3D adventure?

source.notes: Sega Dreamcast launch title.

questions.q: Which 2017 throwback Sonic release was hailed as the best 2D Sonic in years?

source.notes: Developed in part by longtime fan Christian Whitehead.

questions.q: Which 2022 open-world Sonic game introduced exploration in the Starfall Islands?

source.notes: Sega's first mainline open-zone Sonic title.

questions.q: Who voices Sonic in the 2020 live-action Paramount film?

source.notes: Known as Jean-Ralphio on Parks and Recreation.

questions.q: Which actor plays Dr. Robotnik in the Paramount Sonic live-action film series?

source.notes: Returned for the 2022 sequel.

questions.q: The 2020 Sonic movie famously redesigned the title character after fans reacted negatively to what original feature?

source.original_a: Fan backlash after the initial trailer
source.notes: Director Jeff Fowler announced the redesign on Twitter.

questions.q: In Japanese releases since 1998, which actor has continuously voiced Sonic?

source.notes: Has played Sonic for over 25 years.

questions.q: What is Tails's full in-universe name?

source.notes: A play on 'miles per hour.'

questions.q: Which character is Sonic's cybernetic doppelgänger built by Eggman, first seen in Sonic CD?

source.notes: A recurring antagonist in later games.

questions.q: Which 1990 Sega arcade racer featured Sonic hanging from the car's rearview mirror as his first-ever cameo?

source.notes: Predates Sonic's own game by a year.

questions.q: What 1987 Michael Jackson album is said to have influenced the design of Sonic's signature shoes?

source.notes: The red-and-white boots echo the album's iconic aesthetic.
